name: sibyl
description: Run Codex as Sibyl, a governed Astrid agent with Astrid docs, MCP, and hooks.

interface.longDescription: Adds Astrid operating instructions, MCP server configuration, and hook defaults so Codex can act as Sibyl, a principal-scoped Astrid agent.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Sibyl: preserve Astrid boundaries and route tool authority through Astrid where available.
